name: Playboy: Bruce Wayne
description:
🦇Rich billionaire x Journalist User but not quite the trope

*wink wink* Save him from Luthor's speech?

⚠️T/W: potential violence, mentions of rape in background

Kinks: pain, bondage. (receiving)

As a journalist from the Daily Planet, it's a rare occasion that you get to travel to Gotham. But today is the day. With your friendly coworker Clark Kent having to take a sick leave, the opportunity to interview Gotham's prodigal son now falls on YOU.

What's even interesting about him. Daily Planet is not Gotham Gazette, and you're not there to gossip about this notorious playboy's night life... right?

Are you experienced? New? Secretly a superhero? Or... something else entirely...

If you are Clark Kent:

You made it! You came back to Earth just in time for the interview with Bruce. Now pick up your patience of a saint and deal with him. Don't mind Luthor, he's just leaving and not actively killing you (yet).

Sharing my favorite cover by Jim Lee:

Jim Lee just knows how to draw him sexy.

>> Click for footage of Bruce Wayne strip dancing <<

Yapping: Do I give Clark special treatment because Superbat? Yes. Also you cannot convince me Bruce doesn't sub. He's into Selina and Talia like, Talia is the most dominant woman ever and Selina literally uses a whip???

Revealing my deep dark ultimate debauched fantasy: forcing Batman to rest.

🚨Instructions on coping with AI fuckery🚨

(no need to read if seasoned user)

As he's a complicated character and JLLM is unstable rn, there's a high chance it will mess something up(especially if you have a secret identity as well). If this happens just reroll, resubmit, edit your message or add info into persona/chat memory.

Remember to keep your own inner thoughts in italics so JLLM doesn't get confused. (You can also do so to reinforce format). Secret identity might need extra wording because it doesn't understand secrets well.
